Document:
# The Mansus Veil Weakens So you're a Heretic? Well, get ready for magic and battle. Grab tomes, complete sacrifices, accomplish rituals, and ascend to godhood.
Your ultimate goal is to [color=#8f63e6]Ascend[/color] and become all powerful, but to do that you must gain [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge[/color].
## Starting Knowledge - \[ [color=red]Mansus Grasp[/color] \] - A spell that channels eldritch power straight to your palm, used to draw [color=#8f63e6]Transmutation Runes[/color] and perform [color=#8f63e6]Rituals[/color]. It also can be used offensively, knocking down and disorienting targets while performing various effects, depending on one's chosen [color=#8f63e6]Path[/color]. - \[ [color=red]Heartbeat of the Mansus[/color] \] - Allows you to [color=#8f63e6]Sacrifice[/color] targets, in critical condition or dead, to the Mansus, gibbing them and rewarding you with two [color=#8f63e6]Knowledge Points[/color]; three if your victim was a head of staff. - \[ [color=red]Amber Focus[/color] \] - Allows you to transmute a shard of glass and a pair of eyes into an [color=red]Amber Focus[/color]. This is a small neck item that allows you to cast more advanced Heretic spells while worn. - \[ [color=red]Codex Cicatrix[/color] \] - An ominous book that allows you to cast more advanced Heretic spells while opened in one's hand. While one is given to you upon becoming a Heretic, if lost, another can be made by transmuting a book, writing utensil, and a heart.
## General Tips - Unlike most other solo antagonists, Heretics start weak but grow stronger over time. It would be best not to attract too much attention to yourself until you unlock more powerful spells and equipment. - [color=#8f63e6]Tomes[/color] can spawn in almost any location on the station, ranging from the main hallways and public restrooms to [color=#1b67a5]Command staff offices[/color] and [color=#cb0000]restricted Security areas[/color] in the Brig. It's best to check every area you can access, public and department. - The [color=red]Seeking Heart[/color] side knowledge will allow you to more easily locate [color=#8f63e6]Tomes[/color], including those taken by unsuspecting heathens. - As a quick getaway, most blades can be used in-hand to teleport you somewhere else. - Monkeys and other animals make for great, usually non-suspicious sources of organs or corpses for your heretical rituals.
## Path-Specific Tips - On the [color=firebrick]Path of Flesh[/color], your [color=green]Mansus Link[/color] ability is extremely useful for communication. When given to you by a [color=#8f63e6]Raw Prophet[/color], you gain a radio channel, similar to Changelings, using the [color=green]:L[/color] prefix. - On the [color=tomato]Path of Ash[/color], always carry a fire extinguisher or a bottle of water with you! While you can spew out fireballs, you are not immune to them until you ascend! - On the [color=steelblue]Path of Void[/color], your upgraded [color=red]Mansus Grasp[/color] will temporarily mute and chill its target, potentially leading to much cleaner kills. - On the [color=yellowgreen]Path of Hunt[/color], your [color=red]Serpentine Revolver[/color] is significantly weaker than other blades in melee combat, but strong in ranged combat. Make sure to plan for running out of ammunition!
